title: The Frozen Legion
lines: You descend further into a slick, obsidian-dark tunnel. As your vision adjusts to the oppressive gloom, you are gripped by a cold, primordial terror that freezes the breath in your lungs.

Suspended within the translucent glacial ice—like insects in ancient amber—are hundreds of the grey-skinned inhabitants. Their bodies are warped, their limbs elongated at impossible angles, as if the ice itself is slowly rewriting their very anatomy into something non-human.

Their milky, cataract-ridden eyes stare back at you from the frozen deep, a silent legion of indifferent witnesses. Suddenly, the deathly silence is shattered by the sharp, echoing CRACK of shifting, splitting ice.

options.desc: Move with agonizing care before the glacial tomb shatters
Try to smash a frozen skull before it can reanimate
